item.title: Subtleties of Python
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
In our proôÙfeôÙsôÙsioôÙn, attenôÙtion to deôÙtail is of utôÙmost imôÙporôÙtanôÙce. Any good ôÙsoôÙftwaôÙre enôÙgiôÙneer unôÙdersôÙtanôÙds that deôÙtails maôÙtter a loôÙt, as they make the ôÙdiôÙffeôÙrenôÙce beôÙtween a woôÙrking unit or a diôÙsasôÙter [1].

This is why clean coôÙde is not just about forôÙmaôÙtting or arranôÙging the coôÙde. It's ôÙneiôÙther a foiôÙble. It is insôÙteaôÙd, paôÙying attenôÙtion exacôÙtly to thoôÙse deôÙtails thaôÙt wiôÙll make a big diôÙffeôÙrenôÙce in proôÙducôÙtioôÙn.

LeôÙt's see soôÙme examôÙples of this in PyôÙthoôÙn.

Leer mûÀsãÎ (quedan 4 minutos de lectura)

item.title: Notes on PySS18
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
Last weekend an amaôÙzing ediôÙtion of PyôÙthon San SeôÙbasôÙtiûÀn took plaôÙce. HeôÙre are ôÙthe main hiôÙghôÙliôÙghôÙts of what the conôÙfeôÙrenôÙce looked like to me.

Leer mûÀsãÎ (quedan 2 minutos de lectura)

item.title: Notes on the Kafka Summit London 2018
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
TheôÙse are soôÙme noôÙtes and takeawaôÙys on the reôÙcenôÙtly ceôÙleôÙbraôÙted KaôÙfka SuôÙmôÙmiôÙt 2018 in LonôÙdon.

The conôÙfeôÙrenôÙce was orôÙgaôÙniôÙzed in thôÙree paôÙraôÙllel traôÙcks for sesôÙsions that weôÙre ôÙcoôÙveôÙring stream proôÙceôÙsôÙsinôÙg, piôÙpeôÙliôÙnes, and inôÙterôÙnalôÙs. To get a good exôÙpeôÙrienôÙce, I attenôÙded taôÙlks of the thôÙree tyôÙpes, but wiôÙth a liôÙttle preôÙfeôÙrenôÙce toôÙwarôÙdôÙs inôÙterôÙnals and streaôÙms.

It was a twoôÙ-ôÙday conôÙfeôÙrenôÙce wiôÙth loôÙts of vaôÙluaôÙble teôÙchôÙniôÙcal conôÙtenôÙt, aweôÙsoôÙme ôÙtaôÙlks, speakerôÙs, and a lot moôÙre. HeôÙre are the hiôÙghôÙliôÙghôÙts.

Leer mûÀsãÎ (quedan 1 minutos de lectura)

item.title: Exploring Generators and Coroutines
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
LeôÙt's reôÙviôÙsit the idea of geôÙneôÙraôÙtors in PyôÙthoôÙn, in orôÙder to unôÙdersôÙtanôÙd how the suôÙpport for coôÙrouôÙtiôÙnes was achieôÙved in laôÙtest verôÙsions of PyôÙthon (3.6, at the tiôÙme of this wriôÙtinôÙg).

By reôÙviewing the miôÙlesôÙtoôÙnes on geôÙneôÙraôÙtorôÙs, chôÙroôÙnoôÙloôÙgiôÙcaôÙllôÙy, we can get a beôÙtteôÙr iôÙdea of the evoôÙluôÙtion that lead to asôÙynôÙchôÙroôÙnous proôÙgraôÙmôÙming in PyôÙthoôÙn.

We wiôÙll reôÙview the main chanôÙges in PyôÙthon that reôÙlaôÙte to geôÙneôÙraôÙtors anôÙd aôÙsôÙynôÙchôÙroôÙnous proôÙgraôÙmôÙminôÙg, starôÙting wiôÙth PEôÙP-255 (SimôÙple GeôÙneôÙraôÙtorôÙs), PEôÙP-342 (ôÙCoôÙrouôÙtiôÙnes via EnhanôÙced GeôÙneôÙraôÙtorôÙs), PEôÙP-380 (SôÙynôÙtax for deôÙleôÙgaôÙting to a ôÙSuôÙb-ôÙGeôÙneôÙraôÙtoôÙr), and fiôÙnisôÙhing wiôÙth PEôÙP-525 (AôÙsôÙynôÙchôÙroôÙnous GeôÙneôÙraôÙtorôÙs).

Leer mûÀsãÎ (quedan 16 minutos de lectura)

item.title: 2017 in Review
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
A reôÙcap of the main evenôÙts and posôÙts thôÙrouôÙghout the year that is enôÙdinôÙg.

This year I attenôÙded soôÙme conôÙfeôÙrenôÙces overôÙseaôÙs, wheôÙre I preôÙsenôÙted taôÙlks. FirsôÙt, in JuôÙne, I went to the beauôÙtiôÙful ciôÙty of PraôÙgue for PyôÙCon CZ 2017. At firsôÙt, I ôÙgot onôÙly one taôÙlk approôÙveôÙd, DisôÙcoôÙveôÙring DesôÙcripôÙtors, whiôÙch was a new ôÙtoôÙpic I was preôÙsenôÙtinôÙg. A few daôÙys beôÙfoôÙre the conôÙfeôÙrenôÙce starteôÙd, anoôÙtheôÙr sôÙpeaker had to step doôÙwn, so I was asked to fiôÙll in the sloôÙt, to whiôÙch I agreeôÙd by proôÙpoôÙsing my taôÙlk of clean coôÙde in PyôÙthoôÙn. That meant I preôÙsenôÙted one the ôÙfirst two daôÙys of the conôÙfeôÙrenôÙce, and then attenôÙded the woôÙrksôÙhop on the lasôÙt ôÙday (SôÙaturôÙdaôÙy).

The conôÙfeôÙrenôÙce was niôÙce, and as alwaôÙys, a great opporôÙtuôÙniôÙty for neôÙtwoôÙrking anôÙd ôÙlearôÙninôÙg.

JuôÙly was the monôÙth for EuôÙroôÙPôÙyôÙthoôÙn, a conôÙfeôÙrenôÙce that is alwaôÙys aweôÙsoôÙme. This ôÙyeaôÙr, I did not haôÙve a taôÙlk scheôÙduôÙled beôÙfoôÙreôÙhanôÙd, as I did last yeaôÙr, buôÙt ôÙsurôÙpriôÙsinôÙgly enouôÙgh, on the liôÙghôÙtning taôÙlk sesôÙsions of MonôÙday they anôÙnounôÙced a ôÙfree slot for the TuesôÙdaôÙy, to whiôÙch I voôÙlunôÙteer by suôÙbmiôÙtting my new taôÙlk, "ôÙDisôÙcoôÙveôÙring DesôÙcripôÙtorôÙs". So, onôÙce agaiôÙn, anoôÙther unexôÙpecôÙted (but glaôÙd), oôÙpporôÙtuôÙniôÙty that I had to preôÙsent a taôÙlk at a good conôÙfeôÙrenôÙce.

On other toôÙpiôÙcs, I attenôÙded seôÙveôÙral meeôÙtups of PyôÙthon and Go, and beôÙcaôÙme moôÙre inôÙvolôÙved in disôÙtriôÙbuted sysôÙteôÙms.

It was alôÙso a good year to woôÙrk moôÙre wiôÙth DoôÙckeôÙr, and started to learn moôÙre aôÙbout KuôÙberôÙneôÙtes.

ReôÙgarôÙding conôÙtriôÙbuôÙtions to open sourôÙce, I reôÙleaôÙsed new verôÙsions of most of the ôÙproôÙjecôÙts I haôÙve on GiôÙtHuôÙb, but theôÙre is moôÙre. I sent the first sucôÙceôÙssôÙfuôÙl ôÙpaôÙtch to CPôÙyôÙthon in GiôÙtHub (imôÙporôÙtant noôÙte: at the beôÙginôÙning of this yeaôÙr, the ôÙCPôÙyôÙthon proôÙject moôÙved to GiôÙtHuôÙb). It was a simôÙple chanôÙge on the doôÙcuôÙmenôÙtaôÙtioôÙn, aôÙbout desôÙcripôÙtorôÙs, that got quiôÙckôÙly merôÙgeôÙd, but a good head starôÙt.

AnoôÙther niôÙce conôÙtriôÙbuôÙtion is thaôÙt, duôÙring the sprinôÙts at EuôÙroôÙPôÙyôÙthoôÙn, I woôÙrkeôÙd aôÙlong the pyôÙpy teaôÙm, and sent soôÙme coôÙmôÙmiôÙts fiôÙxing chanôÙges for PyôÙthon 3.6. It was an amaôÙzing exôÙpeôÙrienôÙce to learn moôÙre about the proôÙjecôÙt, and about CPôÙyôÙthoôÙn iôÙtselôÙf. CerôÙtainôÙly soôÙmeôÙthing I look foôÙrward to conôÙtiôÙnue doinôÙg.

For the new yeaôÙr, I exôÙpect moôÙre conôÙtriôÙbuôÙtions to open sourôÙce, mainôÙly on the saôÙme proôÙjecôÙts (CPôÙyôÙthon and pyôÙpy), and reôÙleaôÙse moôÙre open sourôÙce liôÙbraôÙrieôÙs. AlôÙso moôÙre conôÙfeôÙrenôÙceôÙs, and as alwaôÙys, room for the best whiôÙch is usuaôÙlly the uôÙnexôÙpecôÙteôÙd.

item.title: Refuse the temptation to pass
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
This is an opiôÙnion I soôÙmeôÙtiôÙmes reôÙmemôÙber when seeing soôÙme coôÙde. DoôÙn't take it as a strong adôÙviôÙce, or a ruôÙle, but insôÙtead as a geôÙneôÙral guiôÙdeôÙliôÙne that miôÙght helôÙp ôÙyou to imôÙproôÙve the coôÙde sliôÙghôÙtlôÙy.

On this post I wiôÙll shaôÙre a tiny and opiôÙnioôÙnated arôÙguôÙment about why theôÙre are uôÙsuaôÙlly beôÙtter things to do in the coôÙde insôÙtead of just paôÙss.

Leer mûÀsãÎ (quedan 1 minutos de lectura)

item.title: Beyond coverage
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
It looks like theôÙre are a lot of opiôÙnions or asôÙsumpôÙtions about unit tesôÙts anôÙd ôÙcoôÙde coôÙveôÙraôÙge, most of them conôÙfuôÙsing of biaôÙsed in seôÙveôÙral waôÙys. For examôÙple, I'ôÙve heard or read things like "this is fiôÙne, it has X% coôÙveôÙraôÙge", or "cheôÙckinôÙg ôÙfor coôÙveôÙraôÙge on puôÙll reôÙquesôÙts doesôÙn't helôÙp", or "droôÙpping the coôÙveôÙraôÙge leôÙvel is ôÙnot an isôÙsue", and many moôÙre of the like.

This artiôÙcle aiôÙms to shed soôÙme liôÙght on the isôÙsue of unit tesôÙting wiôÙth and coôÙde ôÙcoôÙveôÙraôÙge. HoôÙpeôÙfuôÙlly by the end of it, we'ôÙll get an idea of whiôÙch of the ôÙpreôÙvious staôÙteôÙmenôÙts are riôÙght and whiôÙch are wrong (sôÙpoiôÙler alerôÙt: theôÙy'ôÙre all wôÙronôÙg, but for diôÙffeôÙrent reaôÙsonôÙs).

Leer mûÀsãÎ (quedan 5 minutos de lectura)

item.title: PyCon CZ - Day 3
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
The third day of the conôÙfeôÙrenôÙce was hosôÙted on a diôÙffeôÙrent veôÙnue, the CzeôÙch ôÙTeôÙchôÙniôÙcal UniôÙverôÙsiôÙty of PraôÙgue.

Leer mûÀsãÎ (quedan 2 minutos de lectura)
